title: Acuerdo de distribución de dividendo ordinario
summary: Board approved ordinary dividend of CLP 850 per share, payable 15 May 2025. Dividend yield approximately 2.7% based on current price.

title: Colocación de bonos en el mercado local
summary: Banco Santander Chile placed UF 5 million in senior bonds at a real rate of 2.80%, 10-year term. Proceeds to fund ordinary lending operations.

title: Designación de nuevo Gerente de Finanzas
summary: Falabella announced the appointment of a new CFO effective 1 April 2025. The outgoing CFO departs after 8 years. New CFO previously held senior role at a leading Chilean conglomerate.

title: Aprobación de aumento de capital por refinanciamiento de deuda
summary: Extraordinary shareholders meeting approved capital increase of up to USD 500 million to fund debt refinancing and support investment plan. New shares to be offered to existing shareholders on a pro-rata basis.

title: Acuerdo de venta de participación en activos termoeléctricos
summary: Enel Chile entered into an agreement to sell a 49% stake in its remaining thermal generation assets to a local infrastructure fund for USD 180 million. Transaction subject to regulatory approvals expected by Q3 2025.

title: Adquisición de empresa acuícola en Noruega
summary: Empresas Copec, through subsidiary Blumar, completed the acquisition of a Norwegian aquaculture company for USD 320 million. The acquisition expands Copec's salmon farming operations into European waters.

title: Emisión de bonos subordinados para capital Tier 2
summary: BCI placed CLP 120,000 million in 15-year subordinated bonds at 5.95% annual rate, qualifying as Tier 2 capital under CMF banking regulations. Proceeds strengthen capital adequacy ratios.

title: Actualización de guidance de capacidad y márgenes 2025
summary: LATAM updated FY2025 guidance: ASK capacity +8% YoY (previously +6-8%), EBITDAR margin target maintained at 17-19%. Management cited strong demand environment and fuel tailwinds as supporting factors.

title: Reclamo ambiental contra planta de Huasco
summary: Environmental authority filed formal complaint against CAP's Huasco pelletizing plant for dust emissions exceeding permitted limits. Company has 30 days to respond. Potential fine of up to USD 2 million; no production halt ordered.

title: Aprobación de dividendo trimestral
summary: Board approved quarterly dividend of CLP 2.50 per share, payable 10 May 2025. Reflects continued strong operating cash flow from mall portfolio across Chile, Peru, and Colombia.

title: Operación entre partes relacionadas — préstamo a Cencosud Shopping
summary: Cencosud S.A. extended an intercompany loan of USD 50 million to subsidiary Cencosud Shopping at a market rate of 6.2% annual, 3-year term. Transaction approved by independent directors and CMF-compliant related-party procedures applied.

title: SUBTEL autoriza expansión de espectro 5G en regiones del norte
summary: SUBTEL granted Entel authorization to expand 5G spectrum in the Atacama, Antofagasta, and Tarapacá regions, covering an additional 2.1 million potential subscribers. Deployment expected to begin Q3 2025.

title: Reafirmación de metas de rentabilidad para 2025
summary: Banco de Chile management confirmed ROE target of 20-22% for FY2025 at investor day. Net interest margin expected to compress slightly on further rate cuts but offset by volume growth and fee income.

title: Adquisición de empresa de servicios TI en Brasil
summary: SONDA acquired 70% of a Brazilian IT services company specializing in cloud infrastructure for USD 45 million. The acquisition strengthens SONDA's Brazilian presence and adds 850 specialized employees. Remaining 30% subject to call option in 2027.

title: Venta de dos buques portacontenedores
summary: CSAV completed the sale of two container vessels (12,000 TEU capacity each) for USD 58 million, generating a capital gain of approximately USD 12 million. Proceeds to be distributed as an extraordinary dividend or retained for fleet renewal.
